summary: ANDROID 🟥 Incorrect device state displayed after prolonged app idle; wrong headset shown as connected and settings accessible
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app shows incorrect earbud connection state (left connected, right disconnected) and fails to display actually connected Surround 80 after prolonged idle, requiring app restart to update device list
description_clean: After prolonged app idle (e.g., overnight), the app displays an incorrect device state. Earbuds are shown as partially connected (left connected, right disconnected) even though both are in the charging case and fully disconnected in the system Bluetooth menu. The actually connected device (Surround 80) is not shown. The app also incorrectly allows access to earbuds settings for disconnected devices, but toggling settings produces no response. The device list and connection states only update correctly after restarting the app.
